since_last: 42% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.21%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC +2.47% · Gold -0.35% · Nasdaq100 -0.26%. 42% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.21%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.21%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +11.48%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +11.48%, MU +4.61%, DELL +3.98%, NXPI +3.75%, ZBRA +3.65%. Laggards: SPCX -10.35%, AVAV -8.29%, GOOGL -5.83%, OKLO -5.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.35% at $165.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
